title: WOKE RICH KIDS ARE FINDING OUT!
description:
Get PIA Here: https://www.privateinternetaccess.com/thequartering 
The Quartering provides a blunt commentary on the recent wave of tech layoffs at companies like Block and Roblox, analyzing how AI implementation and the "Elon Musk effect" are permanently ending the era of high-salary corporate "daycare" culture.
